headline: This 1 ETF Can Deliver Massive Gains After This Fragile Ceasefire
summary: The ceasefire that was supposed to quiet the Middle East lasted exactly two weeks. After a marathon 21-hour negotiating session in Islamabad collapsed over the weekend, the U.S. announced it would begin a naval blockade of Iranian ports starting Monday morning, cutting off Iran’s oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. For investors holding SPDR ... This 1 ETF Can Deliver Massive Gains After This Fragile Ceasefire
